prompt: Create a highly detailed motivational scrapbook-style collage of Maverick AI (MA49) on a clean white background, combining realistic portraits, fashion poses, soccer action sketches, and playful chibi illustrations. Include several expressive portraits (intense, smiling, profile, and focused), a centered full-body pose in a sleek black and blue suit and white sneakers, and additional scenes showing him in FC INTERMILAN action moments such as celebrating, dribbling, and shooting. Add chibi versions of the Asian man in playful poses such as crossing his arms, holding a ball, doing a bicycle kick, celebrating with the Ballon d'Or, and giving a thumbs-up with sunglasses. Fill the composition with energetic handwritten motivational typography including "AD49," and quotes about discipline, focus, ambition, and a tireless work ethic, along with a daily routine checklist and leadership keywords. Use a dynamic mixed-media collage style with cinematic lighting, sharp realism combined with stylized cartoon elements, and an inspirational sports poster aesthetic.
